description: Style Note boss perfumes from the house of hugo boss makes you feel confident and fresh even at the end of a particularly trying day. These intense fragrances are meant to be worn. The Bottled Night perfume came to stores in July 2010 and was particularly loved for its natural woody scent. Product Details boss Bottled Night is a spray perfume for men which comes in a dark glass flask The top note is birch leaf, middle note is cardamom and base notes are Louro Amarelo Wood and has musky undertones Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 100 ml
